about.label: About Me
about.description1: I'm a graphic designer obsessed with bold typography, smart strategy, and visual storytelling. Every project is a chance to build something that makes an impact.
about.description2: From complete brand identities for startups to streetwear mockups for global drops — same level of precision and passion in everything I create.
